title: Translation Units, Declarations, Diagnostics, and Linking · Object-Lifetime Lens: Link Symbol Forensics
summary: A portable telemetry library compiles in one file but fails or silently changes behavior after its API is split across files. Planned artifact: Add and verify the cmem link symbol forensics increment in warning-clean multi-file interface dossier. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Diagnose duplicate, missing, hidden, weak, and mismatched symbols from object and linker evidence.
Compile with strict language mode, high-value warnings, warnings as errors, debug information, and a documented extension policy.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
